en.61f2ea4f: Be careful of obstacles! Failling to avoid them will damage your ship and make you lose fuel!
en.55291c39: In this simulation, you will be able to see how runoff happens!
en.80aabc4a: All right, we just saw water freeze and turn into snow!
en.6b740144: That flask on the left is emitting really cold particles, let’s see what it does to the liquid water.
en.021c2164: That is why when precipitation happens sometimes it may be snow too!
en.93e70fe9: That is why when precipitation happens sometimes it may be snow too!
en.60e5ec8c: That’s right! When water’s temperature is too low, it freezes and turns into ice.
en.456a45f8: Use WASD or the arrow keys to control the ship!
en.af33d1fd: Colliding will damage your ship, if the bar reaches 0 you will have to start your journey again.
en.fbed9b88: Use the space bar or button to dash.
en.847db0db: But first, let's get to Earth! Be careful there are a lot of obstacles on the way there. The space is dangerous!
en.1f382790: Finally Earth! Everything is beautiful here in the Biosphere! I can’t wait to see more!
en.3096c17a: Wow, the Biosphere is soo diverse! Let's learn more about it as we explore!
en.48c14238: Wow, that’s a lot of water! What is this?’
en.055bfb52: Below the sea is like a whole other world, so many new ecosystems and organisms live here. I'm so excited to explore!
en.599d7e46: We are supeeer deep on Earth now, I wonder where…
en.129d0826: Did you know? When it rains sometimes the water will flow down the mountain, that is the effect of runoff!
en.ea904717: Now click on the “pin” to remove it and let the water flow.
en.b6845667: In this simulation, you will be able to see how runoff happens!
en.3ad4bfa2: Good job! See how the excess water ran through the tube and then stayed on the flask on the right?
en.706fa1d1: That is just like it happens on a mountain when it rains, the rain affects the water creating the runoff effect over the surface.
en.dd3eb617: This time we just saw water evaporate!
en.2a35e54b: In this simulation, you will be able to see how evaporation happens.
en.a34a7569: All right, now click on the flame icon to heat up the water!
en.65ab7687: Great job! See how the water turned into vapor when it was heated? That’s the evaporation process at work!
en.aa95d194: Heat energy from the Sun raises the water temperature, and that’s why it evaporates. Now, let’s get back to exploring Earth!
en.d01d7ca2: Ok, we saw that water evaporates, but did you know it can condense and become water again?
en.cb460cf5: You already know how to make water evaporate. Now try taking the vapor to that ice cube, so we can see condensation happening.
en.9d0eb873: In this simulation, you will be able to see how the rain happens.
en.483796e8: Take the vapor to that ice cube
en.c841a884: That’s so awesome! You simulated water running off the tube, then it evaporated and then it condensed back to water again, just like rain!
en.cf6840d0: I’m learning so much thanks to you! Let’s go!
en.d0f94308: Wow, the Earth is protected by its Atmosphere! It's like a shield!
en.259afc28: It protects the Earth from the sun's UV rays and many other harmful things that happen in space and it is made out of many gases that surround the Earth.
en.9f890bd3: My teacher said it protects the earth from all harmful things like UV Rays and small debris floating around!
en.5a48bb0a: And it's all made of gases that surround the earth! It's amazing how much they can protect it.
en.39b84c38: Precipitation happens when water falls from the sky, usually called rain. It can shape landforms, such as mountains, valleys, and canyons with weathering and erosion! But contrary to rain, It takes a long time to happen.
en.fa54453e: The wind at the top of the mountains feels really strong right now. Why is that?
en.c9d47773: The Earth has different landforms that affect the weather and living beings in them! In the mountains for example, higher in the air, it will be colder and harder to find food, so you will find big birds.
en.d8c3880d: The weather here is so different from before! And we are still in the Biosphere, why is that?
en.4022289c: Since the ground here is much lower than in the mountains, the wind is hotter and the weather much easier to live on.
en.4e771753: The energy from the sun makes the water evaporate, creating clouds, that will eventually cause rain. It happens in all forms and bodies of water! This process is called Evaporation.
en.691da5b8: The Hydrosphere includes the Earth’s water in liquid, ice, and gas forms! It can be found in the Atmosphere, oceans, rivers, lakes, glaciers, soils, and groundwater.
en.e815acf2: Waves can shape the landscape they crash on, causing islands to get smaller and even form mountains over time! But it takes a long time to happen.
en.215e60fb: The Earth’s mantle is hot, soft, solid rock. No living being could survive there, due to the high temperatures.
en.9dc0110b: The Geosphere includes the Earth’s crust, mantle, outer and inner cores. Now we are below the mantle!
en.2d7bc3d0: Composed of gases, it is responsible for protecting earth against the dangers of space.
en.35b25914: Where most living beings inhabit, such as animals, bacteria, plants, and so on.
en.6884a4d5: Composed of the multiple bodies of water on Earth, including frozen water.
en.d1af0b09: Located below the Hydrosphere and Biosphere these are the internal layers of Earth.
en.3181da17: The sea is part of the Hydrosphere, the depths are like a whole new world! So many new ecosystems and organisms live here. I'm so excited to explore!
en.70b989e8: The ocean heats and cools more slowly than land, and this produces more temperate climates in coastal areas.
en.917ba89c:
The Geosphere includes Earth’s crust, mantle, outer and inner cores.
Earth’s inner core is hot and mostly metallic.
Earth’s mantle is hot, soft, solid rock.
en.9dc0be21: Water can flow between the ground, air, and organisms on Earth in many different pathways through the water cycle
en.ff755e5e: The water cycle is the continuous movement of water throughout Earth’s Geosphere, Hydrosphere, and Biosphere.
en.e4d90f22: Haha I got you this time!
en.d95063a4: Excited for our trip to Earth? I sure am!
en.b0d4d1c2: We will learn so much about earth and about each of the parts that compose it!
en.5700adf0: Oh that's for sure the ship leaving! Let's go!
en.56c008ae: That was amazing right? We learned so much!
en.d39c2905: Let's go again some other time!
en.22988cb6: Use the joystick to control the ship!
en.bee7eb92: Wow, out of nowhere there's water falling from the sky! What is this?
en.c1ad1e4c:
Winds and Clouds in the Atmosphere are responsible for changing the weather on Earth. 

Mountain ranges determine the pattern of weather because they block winds from reaching certain areas.
en.1b4301aa: The weather in the lower landscapes is much hotter than in the mountains making the region more appropriate for a lot more animals and plants.
en.1f38d40a:
Did you know?
The Biosphere includes all of the living organisms on
Earth, animals, plants and bacteria!
en.f004a16f: PRESS THE BLUE BUTTON TO DASH!
